title: Make the ML pipeline produce immutable artifacts
description: Have each pipeline stage emit content-addressed, versioned artifacts so a run is replayable and a model's provenance is traceable end to end.
body: Use when building a multi-stage train-eval-package pipeline. Do not let stages overwrite mutable paths — a rerun then changes history and breaks provenance. Actions: write each stage output to a content-addressed or versioned store, record input artifact hashes, and verify a replay from the same inputs yields the same downstream hash. Validation signals include a pipeline run whose artifact DAG is fully traceable and a replay reproducing the packaged model. Risk boundary: mutable artifacts make incidents unexplainable; if a stage cannot guarantee immutable outputs, escalate before wiring it into production retraining.
